CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Due To Plaintiffs Failure To Appear At Judicial Arbitration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Counsel In Support Of Motion For Sanctions Due To Plaintiffs Failure
Off Calendar Feb-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHI LEUNG'S Motion For Sanctions Due To Plaintiffs Failure To Appear At Judicial Arbitration is off calendar. The parties reported that the case is settled at the January 12, 2016 hearing in department 610. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-15-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Jill Bates-Moore, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. Ariel Waterman, Esq. appearing for Defendant Chi W. Leung. Parties report that the case settled. The Arbitration Order to Show Cause is set to CRC 3.1385 Order to Show Cause Calendar to MAR-15-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes/K. Tom. Proceedings not reported. (610)
